content:
🌟 mobai-mcp | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a standardized and efficient way for AI assistants to automate and test mobile applications on various devices and platforms.
✨ Key Features: • AI-powered mobile device automation • Control Android and iOS devices, emulators, and simulators • Unified DSL-first interface • Batch execution of device interactions via `execute_dsl` • Server-side handling of retry/failure strategies
📖 Summary: The MobAI MCP Server enables AI assistants to control Android and iOS devices, emulators, and simulators through a unified DSL-first interface. It simplifies device interaction by batching commands via a single `execute_dsl` tool, which handles complex sequences of actions, predicates, assertions, and waits server-side.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
